raw_title: Book Review: ‘Aging Out,’ by Lucy Schiller
description: From assisted living to elder activism and her own experience as a caregiver, Lucy Schiller investigates aging’s myriad challenges in her first book.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘It Will Come Back to You,’ by Sigrid Nunez
book_title: ‘It Will Come Back to You,’ by Sigrid Nunez
description: Her first collection of short fiction, “It Will Come Back to You,” is threaded with erudition but never pretentious.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Catch the Devil,’ by Pamela Colloff
description: In “Catch the Devil,” Pamela Colloff vividly tells the true story of the con man who traded on other prisoners’ “confessions” for clemency.
